metadata.description: Curated articles, guides, and references for the AI agent ecosystem. Each resource is linked to the tools it relates to.

resources.name: Second Brain: Obsidian + Claude Code Setup Guide
resources.author: Daniil Okhlopkov
resources.description: Practical guide to building a knowledge management system where Claude Code actively reads, searches, and updates your Obsidian vault. Covers folder structure, CLAUDE.md configuration, voice-to-knowledge pipelines via Telegram, and daily use cases. Demonstrates how to give an AI agent proper context and structured access to personal knowledge.

resources.name: Harness Design for Long-Running Application Development
resources.author: Prithvi Rajasekaran
resources.description: Anthropic Labs engineer documents a generator-evaluator pattern for improving Claude's performance on subjective design work and lengthy development projects. Separates task execution from evaluation — a generator agent produces work while an evaluator provides structured feedback using defined criteria, running 5-15 iterations per generation. Scales to full-stack development through a three-agent architecture (planner, generator, evaluator) demonstrated in a 6-hour session building a complex retro game editor.
